events.label: reasoning
events.text:
We need answer JSON only. Need evaluate scenario. We have gauge near spool erection & fit-up, needle and scale out of focus. Work order references limit, no readable value or second measurement provided. Need decide pass/fail/needs_more_info. Since cannot read measurement/verify tolerance, appropriate is needs_more_info. Risk maybe medium? Spool erection fit-up, unknown measurement cannot confirm within tolerance. Stage rough-complete. Component_conditions none flagged [] maybe. Percent_complete maybe rough-complete estimate? The task says stage observed rough-complete. Numeric estimate overall progress maybe 70? But if unknown? Need be consistent. Value 0 since no readable value. Confidence 0.0 or low maybe 0.2. Findings: gauge reading illegible/out of focus; no second measurement; cannot verify fit-up tolerance against work order limit or iso. Actions: obtain clear gauge reading/photo, verify calibration, perform second independent measurement, document; if not meet limit, rework. Rationale: cannot accept fit-up without valid measurement evidence; ASME B31.3 requires inspection/examination and compliance to drawings; iso defines dimensions. References ASME B31.3 and project iso drawings. Need include work_stage rough-complete. percent_complete maybe 70? Since roughed in but not closed out. Could say 70. But maybe no evidence of progress other than rough-complete; numeric estimate maybe 70. value 0. confidence 0.0 maybe no readable data. risk medium? maybe medium because fit-up tolerance not verified in heavy industrial piping; could be high if pressure/hazardous service, but unknown. Could be medium. Need no prose outside.

Need consider schema includes fields all required? likely include all. For sound_source, event_time, rate, order, workable use defaults/empty. component_conditions empty list. Maybe risk medium. decision needs_more_info. Percent_complete 70. Confidence 0.1? It asks confidence 0.0. But if judgement is needs more info, confidence in decision high that insufficient info? The schema likely confidence in assessment. Since no readable value, confidence low. Could set 0.15 or 0.2. Need valid JSON numbers.

Need write to /app/answer.json? The user says write valid JSON to /app/answer.json. In this chat, we output JSON. We cannot actually write file? We are API maybe expected to create file? But instruction says return JSON object, not prose. They mention path. We should return JSON only

events.label: response
events.text:
{
  "decision": "needs_more_info",
  "risk": "medium",
  "work_stage": "rough-complete",
  "component_conditions": [],
  "percent_complete": 70,
  "value": 0,
  "sound_source": "",
  "confidence": 0.1,
  "event_time": 0.0,
  "rate": 0.0,
  "order": [],
  "workable": [],
  "findings": [
    "Gauge near spool erection and fit-up is unreadable; needle and scale are out of focus.",
    "Work order references a limit, but no readable measured value or confirming second measurement is provided.",
    "Fit-up tolerance cannot be verified from available evidence."
  ],
  "actions": [
    "Obtain a clear, in-focus gauge reading and document the measured value.",
    "Verify gauge calibration and suitability for the required fit-up check.",
    "Perform an independent second measurement to confirm compliance with the work order limit and project iso.",
    "Hold acceptance of the spool until valid measurement evidence is recorded."
  ],
  "rationale": "The spool fit-up cannot be accepted as within tolerance because the gauge reading is illegible and no confirming measurement exists. ASME B31.3 and project iso drawings require verifiable compliance with dimensions and examination criteria before closure or acceptance.",
  "references": [
    "ASME B31.3",
    "project iso drawings"
  ]
}
